---
id: get-short-breaks
title: "Get short break rules for a property"
description: "Retrieve short break configuration for a property including minimum night requirements, allowed start days, and seasonal rules. Use this to determine whether short stays (less than 7 nights) are available and on which dates."
sidebar_label: "Get short break rules for a property"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/booking-brain-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get short break rules for a property"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/developer/properties/{id}/shortBreaks"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve short break configuration for a property including minimum night requirements, allowed start days, and seasonal rules. Use this to determine whether short stays (less than 7 nights) are available and on which dates.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
